The Simpsons Movie (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $183,135,014Details
International Box Office $343,936,008
Worldwide Box Office $527,071,022
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $97,419,779
Total $97,419,779
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The combination of Homer, his new pet pig, and a leaky silo full of excrement triggers a disaster that threatens not just Springfield but the entire world. An angry mob descends on the Simpson home, splitting the family. With Earth’s fate in the balance, Homer sets out on a quest for redemption in order to save the world and earn Marge’s forgiveness.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$74,036,787 (40.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$72,500,000 (worldwide box office is 7.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,922 opening theaters/3,926 max. theaters, 6.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $318,356,794

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 27th, 2007 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: July 26th, 2007 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: December 18th, 2007 by Fox Home Entertainment, released as Simpsons Movie, The
MPA Rating: PG-13 for irreverent humor throughout
Running Time: 86 minutes
Franchise: The Simpsons
Plot point: Disaster, Dysfunctional Family, Environment, Escape, Fugitive / On the Run, Hitmen, Mafia, Political
Social setting: End of the World
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Gracie Films, Matt Groening
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The combination of Homer, his new pet pig, and a leaky silo full of excrement triggers a disaster that threatens not just Springfield but the entire world. An angry mob descends on the Simpson home, splitting the family. With Earth’s fate in the balance, Homer sets out on a quest for redemption in order to save the world and earn Marge’s forgiveness.
